nodes.name: Clack CLI Patterns Skill
nodes.description: Terminal CLI patterns using @clack/prompts with policy-first, UX-second paradigm and strict mode parity across TTY, non-TTY, --quiet, and --json

nodes.name: Policy-First Enforcement
nodes.description: Core validators must run in all modes; Clack UX is presentation layer only, never the sole enforcement mechanism

nodes.name: Mode Parity Requirement
nodes.description: Same safety gates and outcomes across interactive TTY, non-interactive shells, --quiet, --json, and pre-specified flags with non-zero exit on invalid operations

nodes.name: Prompt Guard Contract
nodes.description: Only prompt when stdout is TTY, not --quiet, not --json, not automated context

nodes.name: CLI Output Contracts
nodes.description: --json outputs machine-readable JSON only; --quiet suppresses non-essential output only; neither weakens policy enforcement

nodes.name: CLI Output Adapter Module
nodes.description: Centralized Clack imports and formatting helpers (cli-output.js) in packages/web/bin/

nodes.name: @clack/prompts Library
nodes.description: @clack/prompts for interactive CLI UX with intro/outro/cancel flow framing, spinner/progress/tasks, select/confirm/text/password prompts
